# Locale

A utility component that provides locale context to child components, affecting number formatting, date formatting, and other locale-sensitive operations.

## Import

```jsx
import { LocaleProvider } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

### LocaleProvider

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `locale` | `string` | `"en-US"` | The BCP 47 locale string (e.g., `"en-US"`, `"de-DE"`, `"ja-JP"`). |

## Usage

### Basic Locale Provider

```jsx
<LocaleProvider locale="en-US">
  <App />
</LocaleProvider>
```

### Locale-Sensitive Number Formatting

```jsx
<LocaleProvider locale="de-DE">
  <FormatNumber value={1234.56} />
  {/* Output: 1.234,56 */}
</LocaleProvider>
```

### Switching Locales

```jsx
function LocaleSwitcher() {
  const [locale, setLocale] = useState("en-US");

  return (
    <LocaleProvider locale={locale}>
      <Select value={locale} onValueChange={setLocale}>
        {/* locale options */}
      </Select>
      <FormatNumber value={9999.99} style="currency" currency="EUR" />
    </LocaleProvider>
  );
}
```
